name.text: Calculating the area of an irregular piece of land

questiontext.text:
A surveyor recorded the following measurements for an irregular piece of land AEDF using a baseline AD. Vertices E and F are on opposite sides of the baseline.

  • Baseline segments: AB = {#d1#} m, BC = {#d2#} m, and CD = {#d3#} m.
  • Left Offset: BE = {#hL#} m (perpendicular to AD at B).
  • Right Offset: CF = {#hR#} m (perpendicular to AD at C).
[[jsxgraph width="400px" height="500px"]] var board = JXG.JSXGraph.initBoard(divid, {boundingbox: [-10, 28, 20, -6], axis: false, showCopyright: false}); // Vertical Baseline AD var A = board.create('point', [0, 0], {name: 'A', fixed: true, color: 'black'}); var B = board.create('point', [0, {#d1#}], {name: 'B', fixed: true, color: 'black'}); var C = board.create('point', [0, {#d1+d2#}], {name: 'C', fixed: true, color: 'black'}); var D = board.create('point', [0, {#d1+d2+d3#}], {name: 'D', fixed: true, color: 'black'}); // Offsets var E = board.create('point', [-{#hL#}, {#d1#}], {name: 'E', color: 'blue'}); var F = board.create('point', [{#hR#}, {#d1+d2#}], {name: 'F', color: 'red'}); // Polygon AEDF board.create('polygon', [A, E, D, F], {fillColor: '#fdf2e9', borders: {strokeWidth: 2, strokeColor: 'black'}}); // Construction Lines board.create('segment', [A, D], {dash: 1, strokeColor: 'black'}); board.create('segment', [B, E], {dash: 2, strokeColor: 'blue'}); board.create('segment', [C, F], {dash: 2, strokeColor: 'red'}); // Labels board.create('text', [-{#hL/2#}, {#d1+0.5#}, "{#hL#}m"], {color: 'blue'}); board.create('text', [{#hR/2#}, {#d1+d2+0.5#}, "{#hR#}m"], {color: 'red'}); [[/jsxgraph]]

Calculate the total area of the land AEDF.

Area = [[input:ans1]] m2 [[validation:ans1]][[feedback:prt1]]

generalfeedback.text:
Worked Solution

To calculate the total area, we find the area of the triangles on the left side and the right side of the baseline AD separately.

Left Side (Triangle AED):

The vertex E forms two triangles with the baseline, or one large triangle with base AD.

\(\begin{align} \text{Base AD} &= {@d1@} + {@d2@} + {@d3@}\\ &= {@d1+d2+d3@} \text{ m} \\ \text{Area (Left)} &= \frac{1}{2} \times \text{Base (AD)} \times \text{Height (BE)} \\ \text{Area (Left)} &= \frac{1}{2} \times {@d1+d2+d3@} \times {@hL@} \\ &= {@area_left1 + area_left2@} \text{ m}^2 \end{align}\)

Right Side (Triangle AFD):

\(\begin{align} \text{Area (Right)} &= \frac{1}{2} \times \text{Base (AD)} \times \text{Height (CF)} \\ \text{Area (Right)} &= \frac{1}{2} \times {@d1+d2+d3@} \times {@hR@}\\ &= {@area_right1 + area_right2@} \text{ m}^2 \end{align}\)

Total Area:

\(\begin{align} \text{Total Area} =& {@area_left1 + area_left2@} + {@area_right1 + area_right2@}\\ &= {@ta@} \text{ m}^2 \end{align}\)

prtcorrect.text: Correct answer, well done.

prtpartiallycorrect.text: Your answer is partially correct.

prtincorrect.text: Incorrect answer.
